sql_array: UPDATE test_date SET event = parseDateTimeInJodaSyntax('2023-03-01 09:15:00', 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', 'UTC') WHERE event = parseDateTimeInJodaSyntax('2023-02-24 14:53:31', 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', 'Europe/Minsk');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_date WHERE event = parseDateTimeInJodaSyntax('2023-02-24 14:53:31', 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', 'Europe/Minsk');
